$comment: Shared Claude Code settings. This allowlist exists for unattended autopilot runs: a permission prompt mid-run can stall the agent for hours, so the whole ticket->branch->implement->PR->merge loop is pre-approved (read-only git/gh, tracker writes, branch/commit/push, PR create+merge, the library audits). Explicitly approved by the project owner. It deliberately omits gh repo edit/delete, gh api, and arbitrary shell. Trim entries to re-insert manual gates (e.g. remove 'gh pr merge' to approve merges yourself); force-pushes are forbidden by policy (CLAUDE.md) though the rule grammar cannot exclude them. Machine-specific grants belong in settings.local.json (gitignored).
